title: Duplicate worksheets on readFile()
author: perfeliclemente

comments.author: slim1979
comments.body:
@perfeliclemente hi there!
did you solve this?

comments.author: msedek
comments.body: im stuck here, i can copy de sheets with newSheet.model = oldSHeet,model and then when I open the book excel says it needs to recover Removed Records: Named range from /xl/workbook.xml part (Workbook).. sheets are there the error is unacceptable

comments.author: msedek
zohaib545
comments.body:
> solved the issue, get a copy of the sheet you want to clone then create a new sheet with a standar name, then copy the model then put the real name:
> 
> ```
> let sheetToClone = workbook.getWorkSheet("ID TO CLONE")
> let copySheet = workbook.addWorkSheet("Sheet")
> 
> copySheet.model = sheetToClone.model
> copySheet.name = "THE REAL ID/NAME YOU WANT FOR THIS SHEET"
> 
> //DO STUFF HERE
> 
> 
> 
> return workbook.xlsx.writeFile("your_file")
> ```

`TypeError: workbook.addWorkSheet is not a function`
I think you meant `addWorksheet`.

comments.author: aditya9970
comments.body:
does this work on worksheets from different workbooks?
 I'm having some issues with media in the excel file as well as the merged cells

comments.author: avalencia-vso
comments.body:
> solved the issue, get a copy of the sheet you want to clone then create a new sheet with a standar name, then copy the model then put the real name:
> 
> ```
> let sheetToClone = workbook.getWorkSheet("ID TO CLONE")
> let copySheet = workbook.addWorkSheet("Sheet")
> 
> copySheet.model = sheetToClone.model
> copySheet.name = "THE REAL ID/NAME YOU WANT FOR THIS SHEET"
> 
> //DO STUFF HERE
> 
> 
> 
> return workbook.xlsx.writeFile("your_file")
> ```

I get a "Worksheet name already exists" error.

comments.author: avalencia-vso
comments.body:
I adapted the code above as shown below and it works for me!

```
let sheetToClone = workbook.getWorksheet("Original");
let cloneSheet = workbook.addWorksheet("Clone");

const tmpModel = structuredClone( sheetToClone.model );  // Create Deep Clone of Original Sheet's Model

tmpModel.name = cloneSheet.name;  // Update Cloned Model's Name to Match the Cloned Sheet Name
 
cloneSheet.model = tmpModel;  // Replace Cloned Sheet's Model
```

comments.author: Egor-Lee
comments.body: This does NOT clone sheet, but only create EMPTY sheets, liar!
